textPlain: Memory safety is one of Rust’s biggest selling points. It’s a bit baffling that this engine would choose to implement unsafe garbage collection.
Could you compare it with Boa? It is written in Rust too.https://github.com/boa-dev/boa

I have some benchmark results here: https://ivankra.github.io/javascript-zoo/?v8=trueIt's impressively compliant, considering it's just a one man project! Almost as fully featured as Boa, plus or minus a few things. And generally faster too, almost double the speed of Boa on some benchmarks.
